title: Insulin Tolerance Test in Mice
author: Jason Kim
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.x2xfqfn

steps.instruction: Mice are fasted for 5 hours prior to the start of experiment.
Collect plasma sample (20 µl) before the start of experiment (basal-0 min) to measurebasal insulin and glucose levels.
Administer intraperitoneal injection of insulin (0.5 or 0.75 unit/kg body weight) using aninsulin syringe.
Collect plasma samples (10 µl) at 10, 20, 30, 60, 90 and 120 min for the measurement ofglucose concentrations.
For data analysis, plasma glucose levels vs. time after insulin injection are plotted, andarea-under-curve may be calculated to estimate insulin sensitivity.
